decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id (corridor_webster-avenue-sbs) matches an existing registry record with record_id corridor_webster-avenue-sbs — same source (2012_10_webster_sbs_newsletter), same corridor name, same limits (Harlem River to The Hub), same boroughs (Bronx, Manhattan). Since the closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, this is a 'new' decision per the rule: the observation already resolves to that canonical record and no linking to a different record is needed.
